pointers: Everyone opens the pedometer app on your phone
Shake your phone like crazy to get as many steps as possible!
You only have a few minutes - so shake fast!
Add up ALL your team's steps together
Your team needs to hit 4,000 steps total to win!
Show your phone screen to the marshal when done
Your team needs to do: 50 push-ups + 50 sit-ups + 1 min plank
Anyone can do any number - split it however you want!
Record EVERYTHING on video - no pausing or editing!
Make sure the marshal can see proper form in the video
The video must be ONE continuous recording
Show the video to the marshal when you're done
Get the cube pieces from the marshal
Build the 3D cube so all sides match perfectly
Use ALL the pieces - no leftovers!
The cube must stand on its own - no holding it!
If it falls apart, fix it and try again
Show the finished cube to the marshal
You'll get a super zoomed-in photo of something nearby
Work together to figure out WHAT it is
Talk it out as a team - everyone must help decide!
Once you know what it is - go find it!
NO using Google or zooming tools - just your eyes and brain!
Write your answer on the sheet and give it to the marshal
Look at the screen showing 6 body poses
Study the poses carefully - you CAN look at it again!
Copy ALL 6 poses exactly with your team members
Everyone must be in the right position and place
Take a photo showing all poses clearly
Submit the photo to the marshal for checking
Get the hunt list from the marshal - it has 10 items to find
Split up and search for all 10 items!
You MUST find ALL 10 - missing even 1 means no points
Take ONE creative photo with ALL items + ALL team members
Everyone must be in the photo - no one left out!
Bring the items or photo to the marshal
Hold the tarp with BOTH hands - don't let go!
Roll the balls across the tarp into the bucket
You can ONLY use the tarp to move the balls - no hands on balls!
If a ball touches the ground - it doesn't count!
Talk to your team and move together!
Keep going until all balls are in the bucket
Stack tiny chairs into a tower - one at a time!
Only ONE person places a chair per turn
Once you let go of a chair - you can't touch it again!
Try to stack 18 chairs without it falling
If the tower falls - start ALL over from zero!
Be patient, steady hands win this game!
Take turns catching the ball on the kendama cup or spike
Watch the marshal show you how to do it first!
Each person gets ONE try then pass it on
You must hold the catch steady for the marshal to see
If you miss - no worries, next person tries!
Keep going until your team gets enough catches
Find and photograph 6 colours: Red, Blue, Yellow, Green, Purple, Orange
Each colour needs 4 DIFFERENT photos!
Every photo must have at least 2 team members in it
No repeating the same thing or place for photos!
Split up your team to find colours faster!
Combine ALL your photos into ONE big collage
Make sure the main colour is super obvious in each photo
Submit the collage to the marshal when done
